input.background: The relation between FEV and SEX in the illustrative data set. Download the illustrative data set (fev.*) used in this chapter. See Table 15.1 for a codebook of variables.
input.question: Examine the relationship between FEV and SEX.

output.method: 离散型-连续型变量关系
output.answer: The relationship between FEV and SEX can be examined using statistical methods such as correlation analysis or regression models.

AGE.description: Age of the individuals in years.

FEV.description: Forced expiratory volume in liters per second.

HEIGHT.description: Height of the individuals in inches.

SEX.description: Sex of the individuals, where 0 represents female and 1 represents male.

SMOKE.description: Smoking status of the individuals, where 0 represents non-smoker and 1 represents smoker.

meta_info.caption: The relation between FEV and SEX in the illustrative data set.
